# T-1129 ratchet baseline — endpoints missing _require_company_id.
# Generated by test_multi_tenant_ownership_inventory_t_1129.py.
# Per-router scope: if router was constructed with
#   APIRouter(dependencies=[Depends(_require_company_id)])
# its endpoints inherit the gate. Otherwise each endpoint must declare it.
# New violations beyond this list break CI.
